summary: Refresh: tier lists+encounters re-fetched (Wowhead recovered; WoWMeta M+ 26-cell reshuffle); metrics fresh; no new PTR build; WCL rdps 500 (5 unreachable, dummy-raw landed); creators 7/25 blocked.

sources.detail: All 6 pages (raid+M+, all roles) fetched live via curl and parsed from the table.tier-list summary icons; era-verified Midnight S1 / Patch 12.0.7; 40+40 specs matched roster exactly (A+ tier present on M+ DPS/Healer/Tank). Re-fetched live this run; byte-identical to the same-day 07-17 baseline (0 tier moves) — confirmed stable, not a stale skip.

Both pages fetched live and parsed from tier__tier blocks; era-verified. Raid 39 specs (Vengeance DH still omitted upstream — absence, not error); M+ 40 specs (spec S-tier genuinely empty this week; dungeon-difficulty tier list correctly excluded via roster matching). Re-fetched live; 0 moves vs the same-day 07-17 baseline.

RECOVERED: all 6 pages fetched via the r.jina.ai proxy (raw HTML/WebFetch were bot-blocked last run) and parsed from the numbered ranking list; era-verified Midnight Season 1 / 12.0.7. 40+40 specs matched (M+ DPS A+ tier; one render typo 'Subtlety Rogue B Tier)' handled via optional-paren regex). Ratings advanced from the stale 07-14 snapshot.

All 6 raid(throughput)/M+(score) pages parsed from __NEXT_DATA__ specTierListSection (tier label field is tiers[].tier); 80 rows matched roster, 0 unmatched. Re-fetched live; 0 moves vs the same-day 07-17 baseline.

Full re-fetch of all 9 raid bosses + 8 M+ dungeons across all 3 roles (51 pages, throughput for raid / score for M+); every encounter parsed 40/40 specs from __NEXT_DATA__. 680 cells, 0 changed vs stored — identical this run; file left byte-identical (asOf already 2026-07-17).

40 rows parsed from the survivability metric across all 3 raid pages (DPS page yields 27; healer+tank pages supply the rest); merged via apply-metrics survivability key. 0 moves vs the same-day 07-17 baseline — stable.

All 3 M+ pages (DPS/Healer/Tank) fetched via r.jina.ai and parsed from the Rankings table Tier column (cross-checked against the visible ckmeans tier list); 40 specs, sequence S->D. Genuine weekly reshuffle: 26 of 40 M+ cells moved vs the same-day baseline (WoWMeta re-clusters on the live ladder and is volatile). Raid still unranked upstream (left as-is). Only WoWMeta moved among the 5 tier sources this run.

Per the pre-agent deterministic WCL fetch step (wcl-fetch/evidence.json, verdict rdps-broken, attemptedAt 2026-07-17T06:24:57Z): characterRankings(metric: rdps) returns a bare Internal server error on encounter 3176 — the redistributed-credit metric family is still broken upstream. The agent holds no WCL credentials and did not fetch warcraftlogs.com. Zone 46 Mythic medians left unchanged at the 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); no zone 47 M+ cut can honestly land. Data unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); zone 54 (all 3 role cuts) cannot land. 12.1 PTR raid-testing scores unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); zone 56 (DPS/tank/healer) cannot land. 12.1 PTR M+ testing metrics unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); zone 52 Dummy Dome aggregate=amount median rDPS cannot land. spec.ptrDummy left unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline (27 specs).

The deterministic src/fetch-wcl.mjs step (frozen recipe) paginated each DPS dummy's full metric:dps leaderboard and merged 103 per-spec raw-DPS medians as 'Median raw DPS (12.1 PTR Dummy Dome, {1T/2T/3T/5T})' before the agent started (evidence.landed wcl-dummy-raw = 103 rows; per-encounter players 1T:2000 2T:149 3T:109 5T:1481). Agent did not re-fetch or edit these rows. New series this run (absent in HEAD).

40/40 rows (27 DPS + 7 healer + 6 tank) fetched live via plain GET and parsed for the top-50 avg M+ rating ceiling; era-verified. All values byte-identical to the same-day 07-17 snapshot — confirmed stable, not a stale skip.

26/26 non-Augmentation DPS fight profiles fetched via talent_target_scaling/castingpatchwerk; MID1 + ptr:0 confirmed on every chart; counts 1/2/3/5/8/15 from the single MID1 build. Augmentation absent by design. All 26 byte-identical to the same-day 07-17 baseline.

Nightly MID1 raid report re-fetched (SimC 1205-01, WoW 12.0.7.68453 Live, hotfix 2026-07-13 — era-verified, no season flip). 26/26 DPS specs parsed as best profile per spec from the player toggles; Augmentation excluded by design. Same nightly build as the 07-17 baseline — 0 value changes.

Period 1072 MID1 (unchanged period; era-verified) parsed from the /period/latest 'Spec representation in top keys' list; 40/40 specs, role subtotals re-verified DPS 60.1 / Tank 20.0 / Healer 20.1 = 100.1. 6 specs shifted by +/-0.1 (Demonology, Beast Mastery, Retribution, Assassination, Mistweaver, Restoration Shaman) — live intra-period ladder churn, applied as a real update.

Forum thread (Discourse .json) + Wowhead news RSS both checked live. Thread tops at post #15 (Rogue Outlaw addendum, 2026-07-14) under build #14 already logged — NO new forum build this run. RSS newest 12.1 items are the 07-16 'Class Tuning Hotfixes' (news=382189, PTR hotfixes with no forum post — not a build per canonical-source rule) and the 07-14 datamined tier-set post (Warlock/Shadow Priest/Survival Hunter — tuning already in build #14). ptr-builds.json unchanged.

YouTube RSS heavily IP-throttled this run: only 7/25 channel feeds returned entries (Obli, Tettles, LBNinja7, Publik, Dalaran Gaming, MadSkillzzTV, Kesslive); the other 18 returned persistent HTTP 404 across 3 staggered retry rounds (datacenter block that did not clear within the run). yt-dlp transcripts UNREACHABLE ('Sign in to confirm you're not a bot' bot-check) — verified on one video, not hammered — so 0 takes / 0 metaNotes distilled. New in-scope take-worthy videos queued pending for local catch-up: MadSkillzzTV 12.1 healer M+ testing set (JytzZ28QBkY best-M+-healer 07-11, 8hzzon6tf9M Disc/Holy/RSham 07-10, r5tL2gAEhSw HPal 07-10, nSw9iA4kGBE MW/HPal/Pres 07-09), plus prior pending list (Obli/Shadarek/Kalamazi/Tettles/Supatease/AutomaticJak — their feeds were among the 404s this run). community.json/creator-takes.json unchanged.
